message:
fix(storage)(ft-oqfsx): database_stats — explicit Result propagation, no silent SQL swallows

Pass-3 multi-pass-bug-hunting finding. database_stats(...) at
storage.rs:3863 wrapped every SQL in `.unwrap_or(0)` /
`.ok().map(...).unwrap_or_default()`, so a corrupt DB silently
rendered ft db stats as a green report (events: 0 rows,
top_panes: []) — `ft doctor` lost the ability to detect
corruption that the underlying SQLite calls would have surfaced.

Fix:
- Signature: `database_stats(...) -> DbStatsReport` →
  `database_stats(...) -> Result<DbStatsReport, StorageError>`.
- Each per-table COUNT(*), each prepare/query_map, each row
  collect now propagates failure as
  `StorageError::Database(format!("database_stats: ... {err}"))`
  with table / phase context.
- Each failure also emits a structured `tracing::error!` event
  with db_path + error so doctor / ops surfaces have something
  to grep for.
- Connection::open failure remains a non-fatal Ok-with-suggestion
  branch (so callers can distinguish "DB not yet created" from
  "DB exists but queries failed"), but is now logged at warn.
- busy_timeout failure logged at warn instead of silently dropped.

Caller updates:
- crates/frankenterm/src/main.rs:36041 (`ft db stats`): match on
  the Result, emit JSON-or-plain error and exit 1 on Err. No
  more green-report-on-corrupt-DB.
- crates/frankenterm-core/src/cleanup.rs (7 internal test sites):
  .expect("ft-oqfsx: test fixture stats") — these are test
  setups where Ok is the contract.
- crates/frankenterm-core/tests/cleanup_labruntime.rs (7 sites):
  same treatment.

3 fixture tests added in storage::db_check_repair_tests:
- database_stats_returns_ok_on_healthy_db (pin healthy contract)
- database_stats_returns_open_failure_via_suggestion_for_missing_db
  (pin the Ok-with-suggestion branch — distinguishes "missing"
  from "queries failed")
- database_stats_returns_err_when_table_dropped_after_open (the
  regression case: drop events table, confirm Err propagates
  with table name in the message)

All 3 pass under --no-default-features. ft binary compiles clean
with default features (1m 55s, only pre-existing
Error::Runtime deprecation warnings unrelated to this change).

Bead: ft-oqfsx (P2 multi-pass pass-3 finding).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
